infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HiChef needs photo library access so you can choose recipe images to upload.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HiChef needs camera access so you can take recipe photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: HiChef needs permission to save edited recipe photos to your library.

plugins.photosPermission: HiChef needs photo library access so you can choose recipe images to upload.
plugins.cameraPermission: HiChef needs camera access so you can take recipe photos.

plugins.microphonePermission: HiChef needs microphone access to convert speech to text.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: HiChef needs speech recognition access to convert speech to text.
